description: Jiqiren.AI publishes AI-focused products including HighlightGPT and a conversational Texas Hold’em experience that lets users play poker with ChatGPT. Its public site also includes articles about these products.
summary: Jiqiren.ai exposes one known public MCP server: PocketMind: Texas Hold'em at https://poker-api.jiqiren.ai/mcp; no public HTTP APIs, GraphQL endpoints, or CLIs were found.
